description_long: This is a classic football with a traditional black-and-white pattern, featuring pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface shows some scuff marks and slight discoloration, indicating it has been used but is still in good condition. The seams between the panels are visible, suggesting a stitched construction. The ball has a slightly matte finish with a subtle sheen, typical of synthetic leather or polyurethane materials. Its spherical shape is well-maintained, and the texture appears semi-soft, suitable for play on various urban surfaces. No visible branding or league logos are present on the exterior.
description: A classic black-and-white football with visible stitched panels and light signs of use. The surface is slightly matte with some scuff marks.
description_view_0: This view highlights the black pentagonal panels and visible stitching, with some scuffing on the white panels.
description_view_1: This view shows a more reflective white panel at the center, with less visible wear and a subtle sheen.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side displays the black pentagonal panels and moderate surface wear.
description_view_3: This view features a central white panel with a noticeable shine and minimal scuffing.
